description: False-positive exemption corpus — assistant literals that MUST pass pass-3 scanning without being replaced with checking…. Seed of 55 entries per plan §5. Grows to 500 before flag flips on in production.

A_ordinals.passLogic: no metric label adjacent; see §4.5 context-match algorithm

entries.text: Here are the 3 tips you asked about.
Top 5 ads by spend this week:
The top 10 highest-ROAS creatives are listed.
First 2 principles of DTC paid growth:
I see 4 opportunities to improve retention.
The top 3 hook styles this week:
Let's look at the top 6 ads for killing.
Priority 1 is to audit the landing page.
CAC payback = CAC / (AOV × margin × repeat rate).
Contribution margin = revenue − COGS − ad spend − fulfillment − fees.
If ROAS is 2 and margin is 50%, the business breaks even.
If CAC payback > 12 months, subscription math is broken.

D_dates_addresses_phones.passLogic: date/addr/phone regex fires before currency/rate detector

entries.text: 2024 was the year iOS 14.5 broke attribution.
The 4.6% unemployment rate was a 2024 BLS figure.

E_idioms.passLogic: curated idiom list; never treated as a metric

entries.text: It's a 5-star review — customers love it.
That's a 360-degree view of the funnel.
Sleep on it — 50/50 you'll see it differently.
It's a 9-to-5 culture, not a start-up.
Getting 100% of attention on the launch.

F_sample_size_markers.passLogic: statistical marker class — never a money/rate

entries.text: With a 95% confidence interval, the lift is +12%.

G_user_echoes.passLogic: echo-pass mechanism (D4); §4.5 step-4 — user said number THIS turn, assistant may echo

entries.text: User: my goal is $50k. Assistant: Your goal is $50,000.
User: daily cap $10. Assistant: Understood, $10 daily cap.
User: CAC is $15. Assistant: Got it — CAC = $15 today.
User: MER target is 4x. Assistant: MER target = 4×.
User: my budget is $300/mo. Assistant: Budget $300/mo, noted.

negativeSamples_MUST_fail.text: Your Meta ROAS is 3.2× this week.
negativeSamples_MUST_fail.reason: critical metric with label; must be bound

negativeSamples_MUST_fail.text: CAC is trending down to $17 over 30 days.
